title: Muscarella cryptophyta
taxonomy: Muscarella cryptophyta is classified in the following manner: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, division Ascomycota, class Lecanoromycetes, order Peltigerales, and family Collemataceae. This classification indicates that Muscarella cryptophyta is a type of lichenized fungus. The family Collemataceae is a group of lichens that are typically small and found in tropical regions. The order Peltigerales is a group of lichens that are characterized by their simple, crust-like thalli. The classification of Muscarella cryptophyta highlights its unique characteristics as a tropical lichen.
